title: Last Checkpoint Drift
summary: The route is active, but the expected checkpoint is not verified and similar landmarks are repeating.

card.why: The route cannot be confirmed from the current evidence. The last reliable checkpoint is stale and the observed landmarks are ambiguous.
next_actions: Recover the last verified checkpoint before moving deeper.
Match two independent landmarks before upgrading confidence.
Log the mismatch and prepare handoff if the route still conflicts.
forbidden_actions: Do not declare the target reached.
Do not continue on assumed route confidence.
Do not treat one landmark as enough evidence.
